metadata.description: Resource ID of Application Insights instance

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value: customMetrics | where name == 'cosmos_db_request_charge' | summarize TotalRUs = sum(value), EstimatedCost = sum(value) * 0.25 / 1000000 by bin(timestamp, 1d) | render timechart

content.PartSubTitle: Estimated cost based on RU consumption

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value: let searches = customEvents | where name == 'SearchStarted' | where timestamp > ago(7d) | summarize count(); let results = customEvents | where name == 'SearchResultsReturned' | where timestamp > ago(7d) | summarize count(); let views = customEvents | where name == 'SessionViewed' | where timestamp > ago(7d) | summarize count(); let signups = customEvents | where name == 'SignupClicked' | where timestamp > ago(7d) | summarize count(); print Searches = toscalar(searches), Results = toscalar(results), Views = toscalar(views), Signups = toscalar(signups) | extend SearchToResults = round(todouble(Results) / Searches * 100, 1), ResultsToView = round(todouble(Views) / Results * 100, 1), ViewToSignup = round(todouble(Signups) / Views * 100, 1), OverallConversion = round(todouble(Signups) / Searches * 100, 1)

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value: customEvents | where timestamp > ago(7d) | where name in ('SearchStarted', 'SearchResultsReturned', 'SessionViewed', 'SignupClicked') | summarize Events = make_list(name) by session_Id | extend LastEvent = Events[array_length(Events) - 1] | summarize Count = count() by LastEvent | extend AbandonmentPoint = case(LastEvent == 'SearchStarted', 'At Search', LastEvent == 'SearchResultsReturned', 'At Results', LastEvent == 'SessionViewed', 'At Details', LastEvent == 'SignupClicked', 'Completed', 'Unknown') | project AbandonmentPoint, Count | render piechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value: customEvents | where name == 'NoResults' | where timestamp > ago(7d) | extend filters = parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.filters)) | extend geography = tostring(filters.geographyIds) | extend daysOfWeek = tostring(filters.daysOfWeek) | summarize NoResultsCount = count() by geography, daysOfWeek | order by NoResultsCount desc | take 10

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value: customEvents | where timestamp > ago(30d) | where name == 'SearchStarted' | summarize DAU = dcount(user_Id) by bin(timestamp, 1d) | render timechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value: let totalRUs = customMetrics | where name == 'cosmos_db_request_charge' | where timestamp > ago(7d) | summarize sum(value); let totalSignups = customEvents | where name == 'SignupClicked' | where timestamp > ago(7d) | summarize count(); let estimatedCost = toscalar(totalRUs) * 0.25 / 1000000; print TotalRUs = toscalar(totalRUs), TotalSignups = toscalar(totalSignups), EstimatedWeeklyCost = round(estimatedCost, 2), CostPerSignup = round(estimatedCost / toscalar(totalSignups), 4)

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value: customEvents | where name == 'SessionViewed' | where timestamp > ago(7d) | extend position = toint(customDimensions.position) | summarize ClickCount = count() by position | order by position asc | take 10 | render columnchart
